zh.Lippe, Lippe-Detmold, Prussia, Germany: 德國福萊斯塔阿特 利普代特莫爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Heilwig zur Lippe於1198年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 利普代特莫爾德時，她的父親Hermann II. zur Lippe23歲，母親Oda von Tecklenburg24歲。她於1223年與Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1250年5月18日在霍爾斯坦享年52歲。

zh-hans.Hasbergen, Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Ger: 德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克哈斯爾根

zh-hans.Lippe, Lippe-Detmold, Prussia, Germany: 德国福萊斯塔阿特 利普代特莫爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heilwig zur Lippe于1198年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 利普代特莫爾德时，她的父亲Hermann II. zur Lippe23岁，母亲Oda von Tecklenburg24岁。她于1223年与Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 斯坦波格易结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1250年5月18日在霍爾斯坦享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Heilwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Heilwig zur Lippe was born in 1198, in Detmold, Lippe, Germany, her father, Hermann II. zur Lippe, was 23 and her mother, Oda von Tecklenburg, was 24. She married Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein in 1223, in Itzehoe, Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 18 May 1250, in Holstein, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heilwig zur Lippe est née en 1198, à Detmold, Freistaat Lippe, Allemagne, son père, Hermann II. zur Lippe, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Oda von Tecklenburg, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein en 1223, à Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 18 mai 1250, à Holstein, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heilwig zur Lippe 1198 in Detmold, Freistaat Lippe, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann II. zur Lippe 23 und ihre Mutter Oda von Tecklenburg 24. Sie hat 1223 in Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 18. Mai 1250 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Holstein.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heilwig zur Lippe è nata il nel 1198 nel Detmold, Freistaat Lippe, Germania, sua padre, Hermann II. zur Lippe, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Oda von Tecklenburg, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein nel 1223, nel Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 18 maggio 1250, nel Holstein, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.Of, Itzehoe, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia: 독일 플레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 잇츠호

ko.lifeSummary: Heilwig zur Lippe(이)가 1198년 독일 프레이스타앳 리프 데트모드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann II. zur Lippe(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oda von Tecklenburg(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1223년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 스타인버그 잇츠호에서 Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 5월 18일 홀스타인에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heilwig zur Lippe nasceu em 1198, em Detmold, Freistaat Lippe, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann II. zur Lippe, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Oda von Tecklenburg, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein em 1223, em Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 18 de maio de 1250, em Holstein, com 52 anos.

ru.Itzehoe,Schleswig-Holstein,Preussen: ицэо, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heilwig zur Lippe родилась в 1198 г. в местности детмолд, фристаат липп, Германия, её отцу по имени Hermann II. zur Lippe было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Oda von Tecklenburg, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein в 1223 г. в местности ицэо, крис стинбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 18 мая 1250 г. в местности холстин в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Count Adolf IV. von Schauenburg und Holstein en 1223, en Itzehoe, Kreis Steinburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 18 de mayo de 1250, en Holstein, a la edad de 52 años.
